sentence_reviews.text: A decoder-only transformer predicts each next token from a causally masked context, enabling scalable autoregressive pretraining, continuation, and instruction following.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer decoder/masked self-attention; Deep Learning/PML autoregressive modeling context.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core mechanism is supported, but the wording adds broad foundation-model/instruction-following implications beyond one direct source.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Transformers, Causal, masked & structured masking.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Synthesized from cited node sources plus the atlas dependency context in data/atlas.json.
sentence_reviews.notes: Limitation is reviewed as a broad synthesis/tradeoff statement for the family-level node, not as a direct quotation from one source.

sentence_reviews.text: Decoder-only causal transformers extends or specializes the architecture family Transformers.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Vaswani et al. Transformer decoder/masked self-attention; Deep Learning/PML autoregressive modeling context.
